notes: All 6 VAL-MAP assertions were verified via React component props, MapLibre style JSON analysis, CSS inspection, and DOM structure checks rather than visual rendering, due to WebGL unavailability in headless Chrome (known environment limitation per AGENTS.md). All configuration matches specification requirements. All 9 VAL-EVA assertions were verified via DOM inspection, computed styles, screenshots, and code review — all passed with correct fonts, colors, clip-paths, pointer-events, glow effects, and responsive layout.

appliedUpdates.description: Added WebGL workaround guidance and Flow Validator Guidance: Web UI section with session management, isolation rules, and evidence collection instructions
